'''Ubuugans''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species from the planet [[Ubuuga]]. They had grayish skin, three eyes, and a long snout. The Ubuugans developed a toxic secretion that protected them from the deadly [[Ubuugan fleshborer]]s. Some of them even considered the fleshborers as a delicacy.

The Ubuugan criminal [[Chung]], was captured by the bounty hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and was en-route to being taken back to [[Coruscant|Imperial Center]] when Fett picked up a distress call from the freighter ''[[Mingula]],'' which was revealed to be infested with fleshborers that had killed the crew. Fett managed to escape as [[Boba Fett's armor|his armor]] proved resistant to the deadly parasites. Upon realizing that some of them had infiltrated [[Slave I/Legends|his ship]], Fett ran to the lockup, expecting to find them feasting on Chung, but discovered him feasting on them instead.
